tool.name: indeed_scrape_salaries
tool.description: Scrape salary data from Indeed for a specific job title. Returns average salary, salary range, salary by company, and salary by location.

parameters.name: job_title
parameters.description: Job title to look up salary for (e.g. 'Software Engineer', 'Data Analyst')

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Optional location to narrow salary data (e.g. 'San Francisco, CA')
